description_long: This is a traditional hand axe featuring a robust, single-edged steel blade with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard. The blade is mounted securely onto a wooden handle, which is slightly curved for ergonomic grip and control. The handle displays a natural wood grain texture and a medium brown coloration, with visible signs of wear and use. The blade is matte black, contrasting sharply with the lighter wood of the handle, and appears to be forged or stamped with no visible decorative elements. The mounting style is classic, with the blade head wedged onto the handle, likely reinforced by friction and possibly a wooden wedge. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the blade or the handle.
description: A traditional hand axe with a matte black steel blade and a curved wooden handle, showing a robust and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the broad blade and curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the narrow edge of the blade and the alignment of the handle with the blade's mounting.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curvature and the handle's ergonomic shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the blade and the full length of the handle, with the mounting style visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural finish, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad steel blade with a curved cutting edge and pronounced beard, matte black finish, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head fitted onto the handle.
